rules: RULE-01: Poison deals 5 damage at the start of every tick for both units.
RULE-02: If not stunned, gauge increases by 'speed' every tick.
RULE-03: Action triggers when gauge >= 100. Priority: Player then Enemy.
RULE-04: ATTACK: If distance <= 1 and energy >= 20, target HP -= 20, energy -= 20. Else: Fail.
RULE-05: MOVE: If 0 <= newPos <= 10 and energy >= 10, pos += direction, energy -= 10. Else: Fail.
RULE-07: Every action (Success or Fail) reduces gauge by 100.
RULE-08: Stun prevents gauge gain and action execution. Duration decrements at tick end.
RULE-09: Game ends immediately when any unit's HP <= 0.

RULE-10: The game runs for a maximum of 1000 ticks. If neither unit's HP has reached 0 by the end of tick 1000, the game ends in a draw: set isGameOver=true and winner=null, and the final tick value is exactly 1000.

RULE-11: Each tick executes phases in this strict order: PHASE 1 (Poison) apply RULE-01; PHASE 2 (Game-over check) apply RULE-09 and if it triggers stop the tick immediately; PHASE 3 (Gauge) apply RULE-02; PHASE 4 (Action) for units with gauge >= 100 resolve actions in order Player then Enemy per RULE-03..RULE-07; PHASE 5 (Game-over check) apply RULE-09 again and if it triggers stop the tick immediately; PHASE 6 (Stun decay) apply RULE-08 stun-duration decrement; PHASE 7 (Tick limit) apply RULE-10.

files.description: CLI Entry point. Parses --scenario N, loads setup, and runs the game loop.
Manages game session, input queue, and scenario state orchestration.
Pure deterministic logic for state transitions based on rules.
